meaning: vt.拿来,带来,产生,引起,提出(诉讼)vi.停下
examples: All you need bring are sheets.
What if she forgets to bring it?
I didn't know how much to bring.
Web sites can bring customers and credibility, even to young entrepreneurs like the Steeds.
Loyalty can bring just as good results as fear or greed, and probably more sustainable growth.
